verses.text: Jerusalem khuapi aw, tho-in sun nitaang bang in! Topa' minthan'na in nangmah hong taan'zo hi
Minam dangte khuamial in tuamcip ding a, ahi zongin nangma tungah Topa' khuavak hong taang ding hi. Ama minthan'na in nang hong ompih ding hi
Nangma khuavak sungah minam dangte hong pai ding uh a, nangma taan'khiatna sungah kumpite hong pai ding uh hi
Na kimkotah khuadak in la mu in. Na mite kikaikhawmin nang kiangah a ciah dingin hong pai uh hi. Na tapate gamlapi panin hong ciah ding uh a, na tanute naungek bangin hong kipua ding hi

Tua ciangin nangmah in mu-in na maitai ding a, na lungsim lingin na lungdam ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuipi tawnin nangma kiangah van hong kipuak ding a, minamte' hauhna khempeuh nangma kiangah hong tung ding hi

Midian mite leh Efah mite' kalaoh note, kalaoh honpite in nang hong tuam ding uh a, Sheba gamsunga om khempeuh hong pai ding uh hi. Amaute in kham leh paknamtui hong paipih ding uh a, Topa phatna a taangko ding uh hi

Kedar gam tuuhonte khempeuh nang kiangah hong kipua ding a, Nebaioth mite' tuutalte nangma deihnana-ah kizang ding hi. Ka biakna tau tungah piak dingin tuate hong kipaipih ding a, keimah in a minthang ka biakinn ka minthangsak semsem ding hi
Meiipi leeng bangin hong pai henhan hih teembawte, vakhute a bukah a leeng bangin a hong leeng henhante kuate ahi hiam

Hih teembawte pen tuipi gei leh tuikulhah a om teembawte hi a, Tarshish teembaw lianpite in hong makaih hi. Topa in nangmah a minthang mahmahin hong bawlkhin ahih manin gamlapi panin tua teembawte in nangma mite hong puak uh a, a ngun a khamte uh tawh hong puakkhawm uh hi. Topa, na Pasian, Israel-te' Siangtho Pa a pahtawina-in a hong puak uh ahi hi

Gamdang mite in na kulhte ciangkik ding uh a, amau' kumpite in nangma na hong sem ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna tawh nang kong vatgawp khin a, ahih hangin tu-in keima maipha tawh nang tungah hehpihna kong nei khin hi
Kigual deudau-in a hong paina uhah a kumpite uh hong makai-in, mite in minamte' hauhna na kiang hong tuttheihna dingin na kulhkongpite kihong tawntung ding a, a sun a zanin kikhak ngeilo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma na hong semlo minam leh kumpi gam beimang ding a, tua minamte kisia-maimang ding hi
Keima biakinn mun a mel a hoihsak dingin Lebanon mual minthan'na ahi taksan sing, hiangpa sing leh taksingte na kiangah hong tung ding a, keima khengakna mun ka minthangsak ding hi

Nang hong nengniamte' tate na mai-ah a kunsa-in hong pai ding uh a, nang hong simmawh mi khempeuh na khe mai-ah hong bok ding uh hi. Amaute in nang pen Topa' khuapi, Israel-te' Siangtho Pa' Zion, hong ci ding uh hi
Hong kinusia, hong kimudah, kuama hong nawkloh nang pen a tawntungin lianin, khang khat pan khang khat lungdamna ahi dingin ka hong bawl ding hi

Nupi khat in a ta nawi pia-in limtakin a kep bangin, minamte leh kumpite in nang hong vakin hong kem ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Topa, nangmah a hong Honpa, nangmah a hong Tankhiapa, Jakob' Vanglian Pa ka hihna na thei ding hi

Sumngo tangin kham kong puak ding a, sik tangin ngun kong paipih ding hi. Sing tangin sumngo, suang tangin sik kong puak ding hi. Nuam na sakna dingin na mang liante uh bawlin na nasem ukte uh thuman thutang tawh na ka semsak ding hi
Na gamsungah ngongtatna thu kiza nawnlo ding a, na gamsungah siatmaina leh suksiatna om nawnlo ding hi. Nangmah in na kulhte pen Hotkhiatna, na kulhkongpite pen Phatna, na ci ding hi
Sun hunin ni pen nangma khuavak hilo ding a, zan hunin kha pen na khuavak hi nawnlo ding hi. Topa pen a tawntung nangma khuavak hi ding a, na Pasian pen na minthan'na hi ding hi
Na ni tum nawnlo ding a, na kha zong tumkik nawnlo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen nangma khuavak hi tawntung ding a, na thumna hunte beita ding hi
Na mihingte khempeuh thuman ding uh hi. Keima min a than'na dingin keima suansa kung, ka khut tawh ka sepsa gam pen amaute in nei paisuak ding uh hi
A ngekpen mipa minam khat suak ding a, a neupente milianpi suak ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. A hun a tun' ciangin keimah in thakhatin hih thu ka tungsak ding hi.
